mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, cover_url, category_id, status, audit_status, is_top, view_count, comment_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.insert: insert into article (title, summary, content, cover_url, category_id, status, audit_status, is_top, view_count, comment_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverUrl}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{auditStatus}, #{isTop}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select:
select
from article where is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 and audit_status = 1
and title like concat('%', #{queryDTO.title}, '%')
and category_id = #{queryDTO.categoryId}
order by is_top desc, create_time desc

select
from article where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 and audit_status = 1

select
from article where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update article set is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and create_by = #{currentUserId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from article where category_id = #{categoryId} and is_deleted = 0

select a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.content, a.status, a.audit_status, a.create_by, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, a.create_time, a.update_time from article a left join user u on a.create_by = u.id where a.is_deleted = 0 and u.role = 0 and a.status = 1
and a.title like concat('%', #{queryDTO.title}, '%')
and a.audit_status = #{queryDTO.auditStatus}
order by a.id desc
mapper.update: update article set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 and status = 1
update article set is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where create_by = #{createBy} and is_deleted = 0
